---
logo: images/logo-sara.png
format: revealjs
progress: true
#slide-number: true
scrollable: true
menu: false
incremental: true
theme: style.scss
transition: slide
highlight-style: github
lightbox: true
---

# Thank you!<br>Ceremony {background-image="images/intro/flyer-thank-you.png" background-size=contain background-position=right}

##  {background-image="images/thanks/bg.png" background-size="cover"}

<br>
<br>

::::::: centering
:::::: columns
::: {.column width="36%"}
![**GYAN JYOTI [SA]{.clr-red}VITRIBAI PHULE (1831-1897)**<br>🌺 🙏🏽
🌼](images/savitrimai.png){width=70%}
:::

::: {.column width="29%"}

<br>

![](images/logo-sara.png){width="2.0in" fig-align="center"}
:::

::: {.column width="34.75%"}
![**MATA [RA]{.clr-red}MABAI AMBEDKAR (1898-1935)**<br>🌺 🙏🏽
🌼](images/ramai.png){width=70%}
:::
::::::

[**Savitribai Ramabai (SARA) Institute of Data Science**]{.r-fit-text}
:::::::

##  {background-image="images/thanks/bg.png" background-size="cover"}

[![](images/thanks/flyer-bootcamp-sara.png){fig-align=center}]{.r-stretch}

##  {background-image="images/thanks/bg.png" background-size="cover"}

[![](images/thanks/free-women.png){fig-align=center}]{.r-stretch}

##  Event Overview {background-image="images/thanks/bg.png" background-size="cover"}

- Open to Everyone, **Free** for all women.

- 09 Participants

- **25 hours** of teaching.

- Three objectives: Website, Thesis, and Slides

##  {background-image="images/thanks/bg.png" background-size="cover"}

![](images/thanks/students.png){width="75%" fig-align=center}

##  {background-image="images/thanks/bg.png" background-size="cover"}

<br>
<br>

:::: {.centering}

![](images/sonipat-bhawan.png)

[***The Ambedkar <br>Educational Society Sonipat***]{.r-fit-text}

::::

# {{< fa brands whatsapp >}} Follow<br>SARA {background-color="seagreen" background-image="images/intro/sara-channel.jpeg" background-position="right" background-size="contain"}

Receive Courses, Scholarships, & Talks <br>Updates on your WhatsApp.

# {{< fa handshake >}} Donate<br>to SARA {background-color="#001b3a" background-image="images/intro/upi-sara.png" background-position="right" background-size="contain"}

No Amount is too Small.

##  {background-image="images/thanks/bg.png" background-size="cover"}

<br>
<br>

[Thank you!]{.r-fit-text}
